title: 🏒 2025-26 NHL Team Elo Power Rankings & Goals Above Replacement Player Ratings 📉
subtitle: Power ratings and forecasts for every NHL team and player this season.
contentHtml: The following page contains a list of NHL teams with their Elo ratings and projected wins for the 2025-26 season. It also features Goals Above Replacement data, which is described here . Find the raw GAR and Elo data in the spreadsheet folder here . Also, check out the other updating models here . Navigate to… 2025-26 NHL team Elo ratings and projections Today’s game predictions 2025-26 NHL Goals Above Replacement leaderboard Historical NHL data spreadsheet 🏒 2025-26 NHL Elo ratings and win projections📉 Note: These ratings start the 2025-26 season as a regressed version of last year’s final ratings . 🏒 Upcoming Games 👀 ❄️ 2025-26 NHL Goals Above Replacement leaderboard 🏒 📊 Historical NHL Data Spreadsheet Similar to in the NBA, this season paid subscribers will have access to a constantly updating spreadsheet of Goals Above Replacement and a variety of other advanced player metrics, plus historical team metrics and seasonal team Elo rating summaries for all of NHL history. Subscribe now The link for this year’s sheet is below the paywall: Read more
